title: schlumbergera × reginae
intro: Schlumbergera × reginae, also known as Christmas cactus, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Schlumbergera truncata and Rhipsalidopsis gaertneri. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been shown to help alleviate cold sores and other skin irritations. The health benefits of Schlumbergera × reginae include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, salves, or ointments, and are often used to soothe skin conditions and promote wound healing.
